title: Review: bridges/wasm/ffi round 17
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Core security surfaces (webhook sig verification, SSRF guard in JMAP) are solid. Main risks are operational correctness (email loss under load, restart re-delivery in JMAP) and missing response body caps (Teams).
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: JMAP server capability negotiation not testable from source alone; wasm browser event loop ordering; Teams webhook spec edge cases. Would raise confidence if: integration tests against real JMAP server and browser-based e2e test of WASM connect/on_event race.
